speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Aaj meeting mein Boss ne sabke samne meri aukaat dikha di, tabhi se mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain. Gaon mein Monsoon fail hone se Papa ki fasal barbaad ho gayi aur Sahukaar ka karz sar par hai, shaayad isiliye mera sharir bilkul toot raha hai aur thakan khatam hi nahi ho rahi. Main is bhari-pan ke saath kal office kaise jaunga, mujhe bas ye sir dard thik karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exact physical complaint to validate the somatic focus before addressing the stressor.
text: Tumhare sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain, aur sharir ki ye thakan bilkul tootne par majboor kar rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhai, itna dard hai. Aisa lagta hai dimaag nas nas se fat jayega. Sahukaar gaon mein Papa ko pareshan kar raha hai, aur main yahan Mumbai mein akela bas physical pain jhel raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the underlying fear of what the isolation and financial burden might lead to.
text: Yahan Mumbai ki akelepan mein, fasal barbaad hone aur sahukaar ke karz ka bojh akele sehne ka darr sharir par aur haavi ho raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Darr toh yahi hai ki agar meri aisi performance se naukri chali gayi, toh gaon mein izzat aur khet dono nilam ho jayenge. Biradari mein kya muh dikhayenge? Ye sochte hi mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Honoring the stigma cue gently with a shorter restatement focused on the duty and a soft pause.
text: Izzat aur biradari ke samne apne parivar ko bachaane ki zimmedari sach mein bahut bhaari lagti hogi...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Bahut bhaari hai. Kisko bolun main yahan? PG mein sab apne laptop par mast hain. Koi apna nahi hai jisse baat kar sakun. Subah uth kar local train pakadni hi padegi bhale hi mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the lack of relational support in the big city that exacerbates the pain.
text: Bina kisi apne ke is bade shehar mein, roz office ka dabaav aur yeh dard akele chupchaap jhelna pad raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh baat hai. Ghar par phone karta hoon toh Papa udas rehte hain, wahan alag tension chal rahi hai. Main unhe Boss ki aukaat dikhane wali baat nahi bata sakta. Mera dimaag block ho chuka hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting deeper emotional exploration now that multiple restatements have built a foundation.
text: Jab ek taraf boss ki baatein sunni padein aur doosri taraf ghar walon ki aisi majboori ho, toh apne andar us waqt kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar se aisi deep sharam aati hai ki main itne saal yahan reh kar bhi apne Papa ka karz theek nahi kar paya. Meeting mein bhi yahi chal raha tha dimag mein. Lagta hai main family ke kisi kaam ka nahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep exhaustion and underlying shame of feeling like he is failing his duty.
text: Lagta hai ki itni mehnat ke baad bhi parivar ko sahara na de paane ki vajah se tum khud ko andar hi andar poori tarah thaka hua aur nakamyab mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha bhai. Ye thakan sirf sharir ki nahi, dimaag ki bhi hai. Fasal barbaad hone ka dukh aur Sahukaar ka har mahine badhta byaaj mere kandhon ko tod raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his burden as culturally normal for a migrant provider, separating his worth from the boss's insult.
text: Ghar walon ka sahara banne ke liye Mumbai jaise shehar mein akele datte rehna bohot badi himmat ka kaam hai, kisi ek meeting ya boss ki baaton se tumhari barson ki is mehnat ki keemat kam nahi ho jaati.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin jab boss aukaat dikhata hai na, toh meri himmat toot jati hai. Aisa lagta hai ki na khet mein fasal bachi hai aur na shehar mein izzat. Phir body mein ajeeb si thakan aur dard hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the specific pressure migrant breadwinners face and reduce the shame.
text: Ghar se door reh kar kamane walo mein yeh akelapan aur thakan bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi mard asani se bolega nahi kyunki sabko apna farz chupchaap nibhana hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, mard hokar rona bhi toh nahi aata na asani se. Par main andar se ghut raha hoon ab. Ye roz roz ka dabaav aur helplessness bardaasht ke bahar hoti ja rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the prolonged duration of holding everything in.
text: Itne lambe samay se bina ruke dono jagah ki tension aur is dard ko ek sath akele uthana sach mein ghutan bhara ho gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Samajh nahi aa raha aage ka kuch bhi, lagta hai fas chuka hoon. Koi raasta hai kya is thakan aur sir dard se thodi der bachne ka, abhi main kya karun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable actions that fit his limited energy and time constraints.
text: Do chhote tareeqe hain abhi thoda aaram dene ke liye: ya toh agle paanch minute phone side rakh kar bas aankhein band kar lo, ya phir apne chehre par thanda paani maar kar thodi der shanti se baith jao.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Aankhein band karke baithna hi theek lag raha hai, waise bhi mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain. Par jab shanti hoti hai toh dimaag chalna band nahi hota.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen suggestion into a simple, single step to prevent overwhelm.
text: Pehle phone ko apne bistar se thoda door table par rakh do... phir ek gehri saans lo, dimaag mein khayal aate hain toh unhe aane do, bas in paanch minute tak unse ulajhna nahi hai... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koshish karta hoon. Par sach bataun bhai, jab bhi shanti hoti hai, toh Sahukaar ki aawaz aur Boss ki gaali goonjti hai. Log kya kahenge gaon mein agar mujhe khali hath wapas aana pada?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Honoring the stigma cue regarding societal judgment with a shorter reflection and a soft pause.
text: Wapas lautne par logon ke taano aur apni izzat kam hone ka darr baar-baar goonj raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yahi society ka darr mujhe chain se baithne nahi deta. Meri thakan aur sir ka bhari-pan bhi shayad isi darr aur tension ki wajah se badh raha hai roz.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the burden structurally to reduce the Seeker's internal shame about failing his family.
text: Fasal ka kharab hona aur kisaano par karz ka bojh is poore system ka dabaav hai, yeh tumhari akele ki nakami nahi hai jise tum shehar aakar apne sir uthane ki koshish kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat toh tumhari poori sahi hai. Monsoon fail hua isme meri koi galti nahi hai. Par karz toh aakhir mujhe hi chukana hai na. Kal Boss ke paas jakar main bas apne kaam par dubara theek se dhyan dunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his renewed focus on duty despite the hardship.
text: Apne hisse ki galti ko alag rakh kar, kal phir se uth kar apne farz aur office ke kaam par dhyan lagana tumhari asli majbooti dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wo toh karna hi padega yaar. Pichle do saal se yahi kar raha hoon. Bas ye body aur thoda sath de de. Abhi aapse itni baat karke sir ka bojh sach mein thoda halka lag raha hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the long duration of his struggle and the slight relief he is feeling now.
text: Do saal ki is lagatar bhaag-daud aur tension ke baad, aaj thodi der apna bojh kisi se baant kar sharir ko wapas ek sukoon mil raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi mein. Ek toh Mumbai ki is bhag daud mein koi poochne wala nahi hota. Aapne itni der meri poori kahani suni aur mujhe samjha, isse thoda bharosa sa mila hai kal ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational aspect of finding support in an isolating city.
text: Is bheed bhare shehar mein jahan sab apne aap mein lage hain, thodi der theher kar ek dusre ka sath dena sach mein kal ke liye ek nayi himmat deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haa, ab lag raha hai ki main is dard se aur office ke dabaav se deal kar lunga. Thodi der jo aapne aankh band karne ko kaha tha, wo main ab sote time pakka karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reinforcing his commitment to taking a moment of physical rest for his bodily pain.
text: Sone se pehle khud ko thodi shanti dene ka yeh faisla sach mein is dard aur sharir ke bhari-pan ko kam karne mein bohot madadgar lagega...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Waise ek baat samajh aayi, jab dimaag shant hota hai tab body ka dard bhi thoda kam feel hota hai. Main roz khudko bohot limit ke aage push kar raha tha paise bhejne ke chakkar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his unfeared consequence of learning to pause without guilt.
text: Kabhi kabhi apne sharir ki is limit ko samajhna aur bina darr ke thodi der theher jana sach mein dimaag ko chintaon se bahar aane ka raasta dikhata hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main aage se dhyan rakhunga. Kal subah office mein naye sirre se jaunga. Boss ne aaj kuch bhi kaha ho, mera main lakshya mere Papa aur unka sahukaar ka karz utarna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his strong sense of duty and realignment with his core values.
text: Boss ki baaton se zyada apne Papa aur parivar ke prati us farz ko yaad rakhna tumhari asli niyat aur taqat dono ko dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya bhai, aaj sach mein bohot accha laga baat karke. Ab main phone rakh kar apni aankhein band karke wo 5 minute saans lene wala trick try karta hoon sone se pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his final positive steps and offering encouraging closing words as he moves to rest.
text: Tumhara apne aap ke aur apne sharir ke liye yeh waqt nikalna bahut acchi baat hai, aaram se saans lo aur kal ki nai shuruaat ke liye meri taraf se dher saari shubhkamnayein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai
text: Team meeting mein zillat milne ke baad se meri chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai ki saans lena mushkil ho raha hai. Kisan parivaar se hoon aur crop failure ki wajah se saari savings wipe out ho chuki hain, isi wajah se shaayad mujhe raat bhar neend nahi aati. Ye chest tightness thik nahi ho rahi aur lag raha hai ki mera dum ghut jayega, bas sharir mein jaan nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the somatic complaint exactly without jumping to solutions.
text: Aap kah rahe hain ki chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai ki aapke liye saans lena bhi mushkil ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chest tightness
text: Haan, bilkul saans atakne lagti hai. Pune office mein baitha hoon, par dimaag gaon ke khet mein hai. Fasal barbaad ho gayi, aur idhar manager ne sabke saamne meri code quality par itni gandi tarah sunaya. Lagta hai ab bas collapse kar jaunga, ye chest tightness mujhe maar dalegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role and duty conflict between his home and work.
text: Ghar walo ki ummeedein aur office ka yeh bhari pressure aapko ek saath akele uthana pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akela hi uthana padega na. Papa ne kheti se jaise taise padhaya, aur ab unki saari savings wipe out ho chuki hain. Main badi company mein hoon, sab sochte hain main unhe bacha lunga. Ye baat main kisi ko office mein bata bhi nahi sakta, sab mera mazaak udayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue gently with a short restatement ending in a soft pause.
text: Logo ke taano aur office mein apni image kharab hone ke darr se, aap ye saara bojh akele chupchap seh rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chest tightness
text: Seh nahi pa raha hoon ab. Raat bhar neend nahi aati, bas EMI aur gaon ke karz ke baare mein sochta hoon. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab kuch ek hi jhatke mein khatam kar doon, kam se kam is chest tightness aur roz ki ghutan se toh aazadi milegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Follow moderate risk protocol strictly, complete safety check.
text: Parivaar ke karz aur is roz ki takleef se nikalne ka aur koi raasta nahi dikh raha hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main kuch galat nahi karunga, theek hoon abhi. Bas himmat toot rahi hai. Jab se meeting mein sunaya hai, mera confidence zero ho gaya hai. Gaon mein papa aur idhar mera rent, samajh nahi aa raha kya karoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk drop and mirror the time factor of the distress.
text: Aise halaat mein himmat tootna bahut aam baat hai. Jab se khet mein nuksaan hua aur phir office mein woh daant padi, tab se yeh ghabrahat aapka sukoon chheen rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chest tightness
text: Sukoon toh kab ka chhin gaya. Mere kandhon par sab kuch hai, aur main yahan IT MNC mein survive nahi kar pa raha. Ye chest tightness aur badh gayi hai jab se savings ki baat pata chali hai, jaise andar hi andar aag lagi ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a simple open question to gently probe beneath the somatization.
text: Is lagatar banne wale dabav aur sharir mein hone wali is ghutan ke dauran, aapke dimaag mein sabse zyada kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi chal raha hota hai ki agar meri naukri chali gayi toh papa ka kya hoga. Wo already kisan credit card ke karz tale dabe hain. Agar mujhe kuch ho gaya, toh unhe kaun dekhega? Yeh jimmedari aur meri yeh majboori dono aapas mein takra rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the exhaustion of carrying this dual burden.
text: Lagta hai ki is badi zimmedari ko poora karne ki koshish aur lamba safar tay karte karte aap andar se bilkul thak chuke hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot thak gaya hoon. WFH ke baad ab roz office aana aur wo corporate politics jhelna, jabki gaon mein mere maa-baap ro rahe hain crop failure ke baad. Meri jagah koi aur hota toh shayad better manage karta. Main hi naalayak hoon jo zillat bardasht kar raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his struggle and separate his self-worth from the systemic pressures.
text: Jo thakan aap mehsoos kar rahe hain, woh bilkul laazmi hai. Ek kisan parivaar se shehar aakar MNC mein naukri karna aur peeche ghar walo ke karz ki chinta rakhna kisi ke liye bhi bahut bhari hai, isme aapki koi niji kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein jakdan
text: Manager ko ye baat thodi samajh aayegi. Usne toh bas 'poor performance' bol ke sabke saamne meri aukaat dikha di. Wahi baat baar baar yaad aakar chhati mein jakdan laa rahi hai. Darr lagta hai ki fire na kar dein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the performance anxiety in migrants.
text: Bahut se corporate IT walo mein, khaas kar jo chhote sheharon se aaye hain, performance review ke time yeh darr aur bechaini bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki sabko apni position banaye rakhni hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Yahan har koi apni image maintain kar raha hai. Koi apni weakness nahi dikhana chahta. Main bhi fake smile leke baithta hoon desk pe, par andar se dum ghut raha hai. Kaise jiyun aise?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role conflict between pretending to be fine and inner suffering.
text: Ghar ki ummeedon par khara utarne ke liye aapko har roz ye jhoothi muskaan pehen kar office ka mahol jhelna pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: neend ud jati hai
text: Kyunki option kya hai? Agar gaon wapas gaya toh biradari kya bolegi? Ki padha likha beta shehar se wapas aa gaya aur baap abhi bhi khet mein mar raha hai. Ye soch kar hi meri neend ud jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt reflection on how he is managing this extreme isolation.
text: Jab biradari ki baatein aur ghar walo ki chinta raaton ki neend uda deti hai, toh apne akelepan mein aap us ghutan ko kaise bardasht karte hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan
text: Bardasht kahan ho rahi hai, tabhi toh chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan mehsoos ho raha hai. Bas paani peeta hoon aur bed pe karwatein badalta hoon. Din pe din condition kharab ho rahi hai meri.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact somatic phrase and the physical struggle at night.
text: Raat bhar bechain hokar karwatein badalte rehne se woh chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan aur badhta hi jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur subah phir wahi thakaan aur darr leke laptop open karna padta hai. Main ab is cycle ko rokna chahta hoon. Aap hi batao kya karoon, theek hona chahta hoon main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a couple of quick somatic coping options suitable for an IT worker.
text: Is ghutan aur jakdan se thodi der ki aazadi ke liye hum do chhoti cheezein aazma sakte hain. Ya toh jab bhi chest tightness badhe aap apni chair par seedhe baith kar thande paani ke kuch ghoont le kar saans par dhyan de sakte hain, ya phir abhi 5 minute ke liye screen se door hatkar dono hathon ko aapas mein mal kar aankhon par rakh sakte hain. In dono mein se abhi kaun sa aasan lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main screen se door hatne wala option try karta hoon. Meri aankhein waise bhi lagatar code dekh dekh kar jal rahi hain aur chhati pe pressure bhi tabhi badhta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide him step by step through the chosen exercise.
text: Toh pehle yeh karo… apna laptop abhi band karo aur kursi se thoda peche hat jao… phir apne dono hathon ko dheere dheere aapas mein ragdo jab tak thodi garmahat na aaye… aur phir unhe halke se apni aankhon par rakh kar ek lambi saans lo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine kiya yeh. Thoda dark aur garam laga aankhon par, aur thodi der ke liye meeting ki awaz kaano se band hui. Par fasal kharab hone ki chinta wapas dimaag mein aa gayi abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe on the crop failure to reduce his personal guilt.
text: Kheti mein fasal ka nuksaan ek mausam aur system ki samasya hai, usme aapki mehnat ya niyat ki koi galti nahi hai. Aap door reh kar bhi unka dhyan rakhne ki koshish kar rahe hain, yeh halaat ki maar hai, aapki nakami nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat toh sach hai ki climate aur baarish mere control mein nahi hai. Main apna 100 percent hi de raha hoon. Pata nahi, shayad main zyada hi sabkuch apne sir le raha tha aur khud ko kos raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his sense of duty back to him.
text: Sabse aage rehkar apni poori zimmedari nibhane ki aadat ke karan, aapne halaat ka saara bojh bhi apna hi maan liya tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad. Agar main thoda practical hoke sochun toh abhi meri job bachana sabse zaroori hai. Meeting ki zillat ko dil par lene ki bajaye us bug ko fix karne par dhyan doon toh cheezein better ho sakti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his courage and practical outlook despite the stress.
text: Ghar aur office dono taraf itna dabav hone ke bawajood, aage badhne ke liye apni pareshani se nikal kar practical raasta dhoondhne ka aapka yeh faisla bahut himmat wala hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh dikhani padegi. Gaon ke baare mein soch kar darr toh lagta hai, par abhi main kam se kam apni neend par dhyan dunga taaki kal code dhyan se likh saku aur apni side strong rakh saku.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his focus on tomorrow and managing his physical needs.
text: Kal ke kaam mein koi galti na ho, iske liye aapne ab apni thakaan aur neend ko pehli tarjeeh dene ka mann bana liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein jakdan
text: Haan, main aaj raat jaldi sone ki koshish karunga. Ab wo chhati mein jakdan thodi kam lag rahi hai. Kam se kam lag raha hai ki mera dimaag thoda clear hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the somatic relief using the exact shade.
text: Ek nayi disha milne ke baad, ab aakhirkar woh chhati mein jakdan aur bhari-pan thoda kam mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Aapse baat karke halka feel ho raha hai. Kam se kam is anjaan shehar mein kisi ne theek se sun toh liya mujhe. Thank you bhaiya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close the conversation by mirroring the relational relief.
text: Apne dil ka saara bojh baant lene se, aapko akelepan mein ek sahara aur sukoon mila hai, yeh dekh kar mujhe bhi aacha laga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Boss ki screaming ke baad se mere pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ho rahi hai jo ja hi nahi rahi. Gaon mein khet sookhne se chit fund ka paisa bhi doob gaya aur ab moneylender ka dabav hai, isliye shaayad mera sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai. Is kamzori aur thakan ka koi ilaj batao kyunki main ab aur sharirik peeda bardasht nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the physical pain first by mirroring the somatic exact phrasing before addressing the stressor.
text: Tumhare pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ho rahi hai, aur sharir ka yeh har waqt kaanpna is thakan ko aur badha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhai, subah se theek se khana bhi nahi khaya gaya. Jab bhi boss chillata hai, mujhe lagta hai bas ab chakkar kha ke gir jaunga. Paisa bhejna hai gaon par sharir jawab de raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk feeling, then mirror the time and duration of his physical weakness.
text: Aise akele pad jaane par chakkar aana bohot aam baat hai; lagatar subah se bhookhe reh kar aur is zimmedari ke beech, yeh kamzori aaj pura din sach mein bahut bhari pad rahi hogi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhari toh hai par gaon mein kisi ko bata nahi sakta. Gharwalo ko lagta hai beta shahar mein acche se set hai. Jab bhi moneylender ka gaon mein phone aane ka khayal aata hai, dil ki dhadkan ruk si jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue with a short restatement ending softly, focusing on relational isolation.
text: Apne gaon aur gharwalon se itni door, unhe sacchai na bata paane ki majboori aur moneylender ka darr akele chupana bahut akelapan deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Akelapan toh hai, aur usse bada darr hai ki agar office se boss ne nikal diya toh aage kya hoga. Pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan tab aur badh jati hai jab sochta hoon ki chit fund wala khet le jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use an open question to probe the deeper emotional fear connected to the field and family.
text: Jab office mein boss ka darr aur khet chale jane ka khayal ek sath aate hain, tab yeh peeda aur izzat ki fikar tumhe sabse zyada kis baat ki yaad dilati hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yaad aati hai babuji ki udas shakal. Unhone chit fund mein paisa bahut umeed se lagaya tha mere kehne par. Ab lagta hai jaise main unki izzat aur is mitti ko kabhi bacha nahi paunga. Bahut thak gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying exhaustion stemming from the heavy duty to save his father's honor.
text: Lagta hai is moneylender ke dabav aur babuji ke bharose ko akele nibhane ki lagatar koshish mein tum andar se bilkul thak chuke ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhai, thakan aisi hai ki raaton ko nind nahi aati. Bas wahi udhaar aur hisab dimaag mein ghoomta rehta hai. Agle din wapas ek machine ki tarah boss ki jhidkiyan khata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize his physical response to the migrant debt trap as culturally valid and separate from personal failure.
text: Jo ghabrahat tum mehsoos kar rahe ho, woh pardes mein reh kar gaon ki fikar aur izzat bachane walon ka aam dard hai; tumhara yeh sangharsh tumhari koi kami nahi balki is bhari udhaar ka bojh hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai
text: Par is sharir ka kya karu? Aise kaanpte hue haatho se aur is jalan ke sath kab tak chalega? Room pe ladke dekhenge toh kya sochenge ki shahar aake nakhre kar raha hai ya pagal ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue with a brief reflection of the feared consequence.
text: Roommates ki nazron mein kamzor samjhe jane ka darr, is sharir ke kaanpne ko chupane ki majboori aur badha deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek taraf moneylender ka pahaad aur dusri taraf yeh pet ki peeda. Dil karta hai roun, par mard ban ke jeena padta hai. Main kisi tarah is halat ko theek karna chahta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote about how physical breakdown is common among debt-ridden migrant workers.
text: Apne gaon se door aakar kamanewale bando mein chit fund aur karz ke aise bojh se sharir ka andar se tootna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi mard asani se bolega nahi kyunki izzat ka sawal hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha bhai, koi nahi samajhta is majboori ko yahan. Tum hi batao, is kamzori aur ghabrahat se bachne ke liye ab kya karoon main? Koi toh raasta hoga jo office mein kaam aa sake.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a couple of discreet grounding exercises that fit into his work environment without taking much time.
text: In ghabrahat ke palon ko aaram dene ke liye do chhote raste try kar sakte hain. Pehla, jab office mein darr lage toh kya 2 minute akele washroom mein chehre par thanda pani maar sakte ho? Ya dusra, duty se wapas room par aate hi 5 minute chupchap zameen par seedha let kar thakan utaar sakte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Room aakar toh wese hi chinta shuru ho jati hai aur baki ladke hote hain wahan. Washroom wala idea theek hai. Office mein jab bhi boss chilata hai aur moneylender ka dhyan aata hai, main wahan jaa kar paani daal sakta hoon muh pe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk him through the washroom strategy step-by-step for practical execution.
text: Yeh rasta bilkul theek rahega tumhare liye. Jab bhi chik-chik badhe, pehle chupchap washroom jao, nalke ka sabse thanda pani apne chehre par daalo... phir aankhein band karke bas us thandak ko lambi saans leke mehsoos karo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye wahan karna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Haan, ye main kar lunga bina kisi ko pata chale. Kam se kam isse pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan hoti hai wo shayad thodi shant toh hogi. Varna wahan us desk par baithe lagta hai dum ghut jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe that financial anxiety biology translates directly into stomach/body pain.
text: Zaroor asar padega; dhyan rakhna ki jab chit fund ke nuksaan aur udhaar ka lamba stress dimaag par rehta hai, toh hamara sharir us dabav ko bina batae issi jalan aur thakan ke roop mein bayaan karta hai, yeh koi alag se bimari nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai
text: Matlab yeh jo mera sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai, yeh sab sirf us tension ka asar hai? Main toh darr gaya tha ki mujhe kuch ho gaya toh gaon mein us sookhe khet aur babuji ka akele kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his feared consequence of failing his father due to illness.
text: Achanak se sharir ke aise sath chhod dene aur kisi bimari ke aan padne ki fikar ke peeche, sabse bada darr yahi rehta hai ki babuji akele us musibat mein kaise tikenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Babuji ko un pareshaniyon se bachana hi meri pehli koshish hai. Unhone apni aadhi umar toh wahi dhup mein guzaari hai, ab main unko moneylender ki baatein sunte nahi dekh sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the duty-based coping mechanism framing his sacrifices.
text: Babuji ko is saari tension se door rakhne aur unki mehnat ki aabroo bachane ki tumhari yeh bhari koshish hi darshati hai ki tumhara farz kitna bada hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ek beta hone ke naate yehi toh mera asli kaam hai yahan. Agar is gaon ke karz aur khet ki zameen ko na bacha paya, toh shahar mein mere paseene ka kya fayda?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his sense of duty acting as an anchor in the city.
text: Apne is farz aur us gaon ki mitti se jude rehne ki zidd ne hi tumhein ab tak is shahar ki kathor bheed mein tike rehne ki wajah di hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Tike rehna toh hoga hi bhaiya. Main kal se aapka woh washroom wala step pakka dhyan mein rakhunga. Bas office mein wo pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan control mein aa jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide one additional low-effort somatic soothing step for nighttime.
text: Ek aur chhota sa kadam raat ke liye hum jod sakte hain. Kya sote waqt ek glass gunguna pani peene ki aadat daal sakte ho, jisse din bhar ke sharir ki akadan aur ghabrahat thodi kam ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Gunguna pani peene mein koi time ya paisa nahi lagega. Room pe chhota sa stove rakha hai, usme main khud raat ko sone se pehle pani thoda garam kar liya karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm his proactive effort to soothe his body.
text: Apne andar ki is peeda ko samajh kar, aur bina kisi se umeed kiye stove par apne liye yeh aaram jhutana batata hai ki tum lagatar aage badhne ka jazba rakhte ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aage badhna hi hoga mujhe kyu ki agar main aise himmat haar ke gir gaya toh chit fund ka paisa kon bharega. Yeh tension rahegi par ab main theek rehna chahta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his relational focus where his self-care is linked directly to paying off the debt.
text: Us karz ko akele khatam karne ki lagan ke beech, sharir par yeh thoda sa dhyan dena, takat banaye rakhne ka ek bhari sahara ban sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi bol rahe ho aap bhai. Aapne bina judge kiye meri baat aaram se suni, usse hi aaj dimaag ka kaafi bojh halka ho gaya hai. Varna yahan kaun kiske pas sunta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time element of carrying the burden alone and the relief of offloading it.
text: Itne dino tak is poore khet aur karz ke darr ko chupate rehne ke baad, aaj yeh samajh milna sharir ko bohot aaraam de raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein. Ab shayad aaj raat ko neend bhi aa jaye mujhe theek se. Kal subah uth ke office toh jana hi hai. Par main pani wala rasta pakka use karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassure him of his strength as he prepares for the next day's duties.
text: Kal ki nayi subah aur duty ke liye tumhara yeh vishwas dekh kar bohot thehrav mehsoos hota hai, apne gaon aur parivar ki khatir datte rehne ka tumhara iraada sach mein mazboot hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai
text: Shukriya bhai. Jo mera sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai, abhi baat karke wo thoda thama sa lag raha hai. Main stove par pani garam karke sota hoon. Ram Ram.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a gentle wrap-up reinforcing that understanding the body's reaction helps in the journey forward.
text: Aaram ka yeh chhota sa ehsaas tumhare agle dino mein kafi madadgar sabit hoga, apni takleef ko samjhte hue kal fir se duty ke liye taiyar hona sabse badi baat hai, Ram Ram.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan chha gaya hai. Meeting mein meri capability par sawal uthaye gaye, tabhi se ye haal hai. Gaon mein crop insurance na hone ki wajah se debt spiral badhta ja raha hai aur yahan EMI bounce hone ka darr hai. Isi wajah se shaayad meri aankhon mein har waqt jalan rehti hai. Ye thakan itni hai ki mujhe laptop uthane ki bhi himmat nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact somatic phrase to validate the Seeker's physical experience of the stressor.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki us meeting ke baad se sach mein aapke poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan baith gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Haan, bilkul. Aur ye sirf aaj ka nahi hai, pichle kuch mahinon se jab se gaon mein fasal kharab hui hai, mere kandho par lagaatar dard rehta hai. Manager ne jab laptop par mere numbers dikhaye toh meri saans atakne lagi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the duration of the physical pain and how the recent event exacerbated it.
text: Pichle kayi mahinon se yeh thakan aur kandho ka dard aapke saath chal raha hai, aur aaj numbers dekh kar ghabrahat achanak aur badh gayi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Exactly. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main EMI kaise bharunga aur wahan farm loan walo ko kya bolunga. Debt spiral itna bada hai ki ye soch kar hi mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan wapas aa jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlight the implied fear of the consequences of defaulting on multiple financial fronts.
text: Andar ek ghabrahat si hai ki agar sach mein EMI bounce ho gayi aur gaon ka loan chuka nahi paye, toh aage kya hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi darr toh meri aankhon ki jalan ban gaya hai. Ghar walo ko bata nahi sakta, unhe lagta hai unka beta IT mein set hai. Unhe apna tanaav diya toh wo aur bimaar pad jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the relational burden of hiding the struggle to protect the family, adhering to stigma protocol.
text: Parivar ko is pareshaani se door rakhne ke liye aap akele hi is bojh ko utha rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Akele hi karna padega na, main hi toh breadwinner hoon. Par meeting wale incident ke baad screen dekh kar ulti jaisa feel hota hai. Boss ko lagta hai main kaam chura raha hoon, par sach mein meri body sath nahi de rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the underlying exhaustion that comes from balancing corporate demands and rural family debt.
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki ek taraf office ka pressure aur doosri taraf gaon ki financial zimmedariyon ke beech aap poori tarah se EXHAUSTED mehsoos kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exhausted hi hoon main. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai laptop band kar doon hamesha ke liye, par phir bank ka notice aur khet ki zameen ka khayal aata hai. Ye thakan mujhe tod rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the feeling of being overwhelmed and mildly address the risk flag with a warm, culturally grounded affirmation.
text: Yeh khayal aana bahut swabhavik hai jab itna pressure ho. Ek metro city mein IT job manage karte hue, gaon ke debt spiral ko akele sambhalna kisi ke liye bhi hadd se zyada exhausting ho sakta hai, isme aapki koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Kami toh office walo ko dikh rahi hai. Capability pe sawal utha diya na. Kya khet ka karz aur EMI meri coding skills define karenge? Bas is jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan hai, kuch samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote to reduce isolation regarding the dual burden of IT work and farming family debts.
text: Humare IT sector mein, khaas kar un logo ke saath jinke parivar kheti par nirbhar hain, yeh financial pressure aana bahut common hai—sirf aapke saath nahi ho raha, lekin koi office mein ispar khul kar baat nahi karta kyunki professional image ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai, koi nahi samjhega crop insurance ka impact meri deadline par kaise padta hai. Main bas is physical pain aur thakan se nikalna chahta hoon. Aap hi batao ab kya karoon? Mujhe wapas theek hona hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the crop insurance failure and resulting debt as a structural issue rather than a personal failure.
text: Yeh samajhna zaroori hai ki crop insurance ka fail hona aur achanak debt badhna ek systemic problem hai. Yeh aapki personal failure nahi hai jo aapki sachhi capability ko kam karti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sun kar thoda halka laga. Par sach mein meri aankhon ki jalan aur body pain se abhi focus nahi ho raha. Agar aaj kaam nahi kiya toh next EMI bounce pakka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide two small, completable somatic options to help ground the Seeker without adding obligations.
text: Is thakan ko thoda kam karne ke liye hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain—ya toh har ek ghante mein 5 minute ke liye screen se door dekh kar aankhein band karein, ya apni chair par hi thoda kandho ko halka sa stretch kar lein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aankhein band karne wala shayad kar loon. Stretching toh office mein baki logo ke beech ajeeb lagegi. Par sach batao, kya 5 minute se meri EMI ki problem solve hogi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion step-by-step while acknowledging it doesn't solve the structural issue.
text: EMI ki problem ek din mein nahi jayegi, par ye 5 minute aapke jism ko thoda aaram zaroor denge. Pehle bas apna phone side rakhiye... phir apni aankhein band kijiye aur bas apni saans par dhyan dijiye... aaj ke liye sirf itna hi karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Maine abhi kiya thodi der. Aankhon ki jalan mein slight relief hai. Par dimaag wahi bhagta hai... fasal, gaon, meeting. Mujhe lagta hai meri saari mehnat barbaad ho gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the duty-bound role driving the constant mental activity.
text: Ek zimmedar bete aur IT employee ke taur par aap sab kuch theek rakhne ki itni koshish kar rahe hain ki dimaag ko ek pal ka bhi aaram nahi mil pa raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism toot raha hai
text: Aaram ka haq shayad mere paas hai hi nahi. Aaj bhi overtime karna padega apni capability prove karne ke liye. Usi dar se dobara laptop kholne mein mera jism toot raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact somatic phrase associated with returning to the stressor.
text: Kaam par wapas jaane ke khayal se hi sach mein aisa lagne lagta hai ki aapka jism wapas toot raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, lekin ab option nahi hai. Agar main weak pada toh mere peeche mera poora ghar gir jayega. Ye soch kar hi ek thandi saans aati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the feared consequence of physical failure impacting the family.
text: Peeche mud kar dekhne par darr lagta hai ki aapke thoda sa rukne se parivar ki saari financial suraksha na bikhar jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi sabse bada darr hai. Crop insurance hota toh aaj ye naubat na aati. Ab toh jo EMI bounce hone ka darr hai, wo mujhe roz thoda thoda khaa raha hai andar se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the physical toll of structural financial insecurity.
text: Fasal kharab hone aur insurance na milne ki uncertainty sidha humare shareer par asar dalti hai, kyunki aisi financial insecurity ko hamara jism ek danger signal ki tarah dekhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne sahi pakda, danger signal jaisa hi lagta hai. Pata nahi main kab tak is danger mode mein survive kar paunga is metro city mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm the Seeker's strength in navigating the dual pressure of metro and rural responsibilities.
text: Is bheed-bhaad wali metro city mein, gaon ka aur EMI ka double pressure uthate hue yahan tak pohochna hi aapki asli strength dikhata hai, bhale hi abhi aap poori tarah exhausted feel kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jism ka tootna
text: Thanks. Aapse baat karke lag raha hai kam se kam meri struggle valid hai. Mera dard aur jism ka tootna asli hai, main koi bahana nahi bana raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the relational relief of feeling heard and validated.
text: Yeh janna ki koi doosra insaan aapki us struggle aur takleef ko bina judge kiye samajh raha hai, sach mein thodi rahat zaroor deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut rahat mili hai. Main ab 5 minute ka rule follow karunga. Aur us meeting ke baare mein soch kar apne aap ko itna punish nahi karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the active step being taken to care for the body alongside responsibilities.
text: Apne upar aayi hui is zimmedari ko poora karte hue, aapne apne shareer ke liye bhi thodi aaram ki jagah banani shuru kar di hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Banani padegi. Agar main hi physical taur par toot gaya, toh gaon aur office dono jagah sab bikhar jayega. Toh laptop uthane se pehle ab thoda pani piyunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the change in routine and timeline to include a pause.
text: Ab aage se laptop kholne aur kaam shuru karne ke beech mein, aapne apne liye ek chota sa pause add kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan
text: Haan. Wo mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan abhi thoda kam lag raha hai. Shayad meeting ka darr thoda release hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the physical improvement and the decrease in the exact somatic sensation.
text: Pehle jo aapke poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan baith gaya tha, ab usme thodi halki rahat mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main koshish karunga ki ye maintain rahe. Kal dekhte hain manager kya bolta hai, par main abhi pehle se kaafi grounded hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the effort taken to ground himself for future challenges.
text: Aaj aapne is bhari thakan ke bawajood apne liye ek chota par zaroori kadam uthaya hai, kal ki meeting ke liye khud ko mental aur physical taur par tyaar karne ke liye yeh bohot maayne rakhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil hai
text: Aaj meeting mein bezatti milne ke baad se mere kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain aur gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil hai. Gaon mein fasal na hone se remittance band hai aur parivaar bhookha hai, isi wajah se shaayad mera haazma bilkul bigad gaya hai. Is bhari-pan aur sharir ki thakan ne meri kaam karne ki kshamta hi khatam kar di hai, bas har waqt thaka-thaka rehta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring exact body phrase back to validate his physical reality using Lens A.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki meeting ke baad se sach mein gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil ho raha hai aur sharir ki thakan bahut badh gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhai, Dilli aake socha tha gaon paise bhejunga. Par meeting mein thekedar ne jo bezatti ki hai sabke saamne... bas pet mein tab se ajeeb si ainth hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the timeframe and duration of the physical symptom using Lens D.
text: Jab se thekedar ne sabke saamne wo baatein kahi hain, tab se yeh pet ki ainth aur bhi zyada lagataar mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gardan mein itni akdan hai
text: Sahi bola. Wahan gaon mein fasal kharab ho gayi hai aur remittance nahi bheja do mahine se. Yahi soch soch ke gardan mein itni akdan hai ki raat ko thik se soya bhi nahi jata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question after two restatements to prompt further disclosure about his dual burden.
text: Is bhari thakan aur gaon ke in halaat ke beech, tum akele yeh sab kaise jhel rahe ho roz?

speaker: Seeker
text: Jhel kahan pa raha hoon. Kaam pe jao toh bezatti, kamre pe aao toh tension. Sharam aati hai ghar walo ka phone uthane mein ki kya bolunga unhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma cue with a shorter restatement ending in a soft pause using Lens E.
text: Ghar walo ko is halaat ke baare mein batane ki sharam se tum phone uthane se ghabra rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Unko lagta hai main yahan city mein maze se hoon. Unko kya pata ki remittance bhejna kitna mushkil hai aajkal. Ye soch ke thakan se haal behaal hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep exhaustion (thakan) connected to his financial duty (C5 + Duty_Based -> EXHAUSTION) alongside shame.
text: Lagta hai gaon paisa na bhej paane ke is bojh tale, tum khud ko andar se bohot sharminda aur poori tarah se thaka hua mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: haazma bilkul bigad gaya hai
text: Bilkul waisa hi hai. Parivar wahan bhookha hai aur main yahan kuch nahi kar pa raha. Ye fail hone ki feeling se mera haazma bilkul bigad gaya hai, khana pachta nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his shame as culturally normal for a migrant worker facing economic distress, separating his worth from the outcome.
text: Ghar se door akele reh kar jab aisi aarthik tangi aati hai, toh sharmindagi aur darr mehsoos karna ekdum aam baat hai; yeh halaat tumhari mehnat ya tumhari izzat ko kam nahi karte.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gardan mein itni akdan hai
text: Izzat kya bachi hai ab. Thekedar ki gaali aur gaon ki gareebi. Kabhi lagta hai sab chhod kar kahin bhaag jaun, gardan mein itni akdan hai ab ki sar dard hone laga hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising the mild risk flag before offering a brief systemic anecdote about migrant workers hiding their reality.
text: Aise mahaul mein bhagne ka khayal aana bohot aam hai. Humare kaam karne wale bhaiyo mein ye paiso ka pressure aur chinta chupana bahut common pattern hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki gaon mein badnami ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, badnami ka darr hi toh andar kha raha hai. Agar main khali hath gaon lauta toh kisi ko muh dikhane layak nahi rahunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational tension between his work in the city and his fear of returning home empty-handed using Lens C.
text: Ek taraf Dilli mein kaam ka dabav aur dusri taraf gaon mein khali hath lautne ki badnami ka darr, yeh dono tumhe is mushkil sthiti mein baandh kar rakh rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda hai. Par aese bandhe reh kar toh main bimar pad jaunga. Haazma kharab hai aur ainth hai. Tum hi batao main ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing his personal failure as a systemic issue using his vocabulary.
text: Bina fasal ke achanak jab aamdani band ho jati hai, toh yeh aarthik system kisi ek majdoor ke khilaf ho jata hai; is remittance ke rukne ka poora bojh akele tumhara personal failure nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat toh theek hai, par bhookh aur karz toh mera hi hai na. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki abhi is sharir ki thakan aur ainth ko kaise kam karoon taaki kaam par ja sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, completable somatic grounding options to manage his fatigue and neck stiffness.
text: Is thakan aur gardan ki akdan ko thoda shant karne ke liye hum do aasaan cheezein aazma sakte hain: ya toh agle 5 minute ek jagah baith kar apni saanso par dhyan do, ya phir gaon ki koi aisi yaad ya cheez apne paas rakh kar baitho jis se himmat milti ho. Inme se kya theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Gaon se aate waqt maa ne ek gamcha diya tha. Main us gamche ko haath mein pakad kar baithne ki koshish kar sakta hoon. Shayad shanti mile.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen suggestion step by step.
text: Pehle ek aaram ki jagah par baith jao… phir us gamche ko apne haathon mein theek se pakad lo… uski garmahat ko mehsoos karte hue lambi saans lo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main baith kar usko pakad raha hoon... thodi der dhyan thekedar ki aawaz se hat raha hai. Gamcha pakad kar thodi rahat mil rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relief in his body using Lens A.
text: Us gamche ki aahat se sach mein us bhari thakan aur gardan ki akdan mein thodi rahat mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thodi hi sahi, par sukoon toh mila. Lekin dimag phir wahi chala jata hai ki remittance ka paisa kaha se aayega. Ye sochne se phir wahi chinta hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of tomorrow's struggles using Lens E.
text: Kal subah uthte hi phir se in paiso ka intezaam aur thekedar ka darr tum par haavi hone ki chinta tumhe andar se dara rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan wahi darr hai. Main thekedar se baat karna chahta hoon advance ke liye, par kal wali bezatti ke baad himmat nahi ho rahi. Kaan sunn pad jate hain soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty that forces him back into a tough situation using Lens B.
text: Parivaar ki bhookh aur remittance ki zaroorat puri karne ki jo tumhari zimmedari hai, woh tumhe us thekedar ka dabav bhi sehne par majboor kar rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zimmedari hai tabhi toh chup rehta hoon. Warna hum gaon walo ko aise taane sunne ki aadat nahi hai. Yahan bas izzat pe baat aati hai toh thakan dugni ho jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his rural pride and affirming that the city contractor's behavior doesn't define him.
text: Tumhara yeh dukh bilkul jayaz hai, kyunki jab tumne gaon mein sirf mehnat ki hai, toh yahan shahar mein bekaar ki bezatti jhelna bohot nainsaafi lagta hai; aur yeh thekedar ka bartaav tumhari aukaat nahi batata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Unki soch unke sath hai. Mujhe bas apne maa-babu ji ke liye paisa bhejna hai. Thoda shareer theek rahega toh thekedar se baat karunga kal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his intention to pace himself for tomorrow using Lens D.
text: Aage aane wale kal ki taiyari ke liye tum aaj apne is thake hue shareer ko aaram dena zaroori samajh rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Gamche wali baat ne thoda dimag clear kiya hai. Aisa thoda shant reh ke hi kal kaam pe waapis ja paunga main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational comfort he draws from his mother's item using Lens C.
text: Maa ka diya hua gamcha aur unka aashirwad, yahan Dilli ke is akelepan mein bhi tumhara sahara ban kar tumhe himmat de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Waise pichle do ghante se haazme mein itni jalan nahi ho rahi jitni subah thi. Baat karke kuch bojh toh utar gaya hai andar se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the physical relief back to him using Lens A.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki tumhara yeh man ka bojh halka hone se us haazme ki jalan aur ainth mein kuch kami aayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Waise ek baat hai, gaon wale agar samajh bhi jaye meri takleef, tab bhi kya hi kar lenge. Gareebi toh Gareebi hai. Bas mujhe mehnat karni hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising his hard work within a systemic frame as an Information strategy.
text: Gareebi ki is ladaai mein majdoor parivaar aksar aisi aarthik cycle mein phas jate hain jahan mehanat ka poora mol nahi milta; yeh mehnat tumhari poori hai, bas system mein asamanata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: System wystem jo bhi ho, ladna toh padega hi babu. Kal thekedar se thoda theek se baat kar ke dekhta hoon, gusse se nahi, samjhauta karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming his readiness to face tomorrow with a calmer mind.
text: Aaj is lambi baatcheet mein tumne jitni himmat se apne is darr aur sharam ka samna kiya hai, woh sach mein bahut badi baat hai; tum is naye thehrav ke sath aage badhne ke liye taiyar lag rahe ho.
